description: Bidirectional sync of Helium browser bookmarks + saved tab groups across Windows machines, using your own private git repo as the transport. CLI, no extension.
notes: helium-sync stores user config outside the Scoop app directory at %APPDATA%\helium-sync\config.toml.
Your sync data repo is not removed by Scoop uninstall. Check `helium-sync doctor` or the config file for its path.
To fully remove local config after uninstall, delete %APPDATA%\helium-sync manually.
post_uninstall: Write-Host "helium-sync config and sync data were left in place."
Write-Host "Delete %APPDATA%\helium-sync manually only if you no longer need this device config."
